description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a rectangular, low-profile body and a light beige casing. The keyboard features a standard key layout with a separate numeric keypad on the right, function keys along the top, and arrow keys positioned between the main typing area and the numpad. Several keys, including the function keys, arrow keys, and some on the numpad, are highlighted in blue, contrasting with the otherwise gray and white keycaps. The casing appears to be made of molded plastic, with a slightly textured matte finish. There are no visible branding marks or logos on the top surface, and no cable or wireless receiver is attached. The keyboard shows some signs of age or use, with slight discoloration but no major damage.
description: A full-size beige computer keyboard with blue-highlighted keys and a separate numeric keypad, made of plastic with a matte finish. The keyboard shows minor signs of use and has no visible branding or cable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the main typing area, function row, and numpad with blue-highlighted keys.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizing the keyboard's slim profile and the staggered arrangement of the key rows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge of the keyboard and the absence of any visible cable or ports.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the numeric keypad and the blue keys on the rightmost section.
